title: Intermittent East-West Packet Loss
summary: Application tier nodes in separate VLANs lose connectivity in short bursts.
context: After a firewall policy refresh, microservices between app and data tiers experience retries and occasional timeout storms.

artifacts.label: Ping between app-01 and db-01
artifacts.content:
PING 10.40.20.11 56(84) bytes of data.
64 bytes from 10.40.20.11: icmp_seq=1 ttl=63 time=2.5 ms
64 bytes from 10.40.20.11: icmp_seq=2 ttl=63 time=2.6 ms
Request timeout for icmp_seq 3
64 bytes from 10.40.20.11: icmp_seq=4 ttl=63 time=44.7 ms
64 bytes from 10.40.20.11: icmp_seq=5 ttl=63 time=2.7 ms

artifacts.label: Packet loss sample
artifacts.summary: Loss remains near 0% except for a short burst around 14:03 that aligns with policy changes.
